title: gelseminum molle
intro: Gelseminum molle, also known as Chinese foxglove or Yellow Foxglove, is a flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Gelsemium genus. The plant contains several bioactive compounds, including gelsemine and homogelsemine, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Gelseminum molle include sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve anxiety, insomnia, and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
